revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月十三]][[zh:二月十三]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 13|qq=February 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 16th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|797|en|797|qid=Q31902|lt=797|1=797}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – All 40 volumes of the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|qid=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihon Ki|1=Shoku Nihongi}} were completed. {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|qid=Q295082|lt=Daidō|1=Datong (disambiguation)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|807|en|807|qid=Q30016|lt=807|1=807}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – The work {{ill|Kogo Shūi|en|Kogo Shūi|qid=Q531555|lt=Kogo Shūi|1=Kogo Shūi}} was presented. * {{ill|Nin'an|ja|仁安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nin'an|1=Nin'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18925702}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1168|en|1168|qid=Q19679|lt=1168|1=1168}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – A great fire struck Kyoto; about 3,000 houses were burned. Landmarks such as {{ill|Senjudō|ja|千手堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjudō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Hiden-in|ja|悲田院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiden-in|1=Hiden-in|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11492721}} were also destroyed. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|qid=Q1195433|lt=Kennin|1=Kennin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1201|en|1201|qid=Q5225|lt=1201|1=1201}} {{ill|March 19|en|March 19|qid=Q2424|lt=March 19|1=March 19}}) – Due to the {{ill|Xinyou Revolution|Yin Metal Rooster|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|lt_ko=신유|fr|Coq de métal|de|Metall-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou Revolution|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Shōji (era)|en|Shōji (era)|qid=Q1199890|lt=Shōji|1=Shōji (era)}} to {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|qid=Q1195433|lt=Kennin|1=Kennin}}. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1591|en|1591|qid=Q6766|lt=1591|1=1591}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|qid=Q2506|lt=April 6|1=April 6}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} exiled {{ill|Sen no Rikyū|en|Sen no Rikyū|qid=Q305477|lt=Sen no Rikyū|1=Sen no Rikyū}} from Kyoto to Sakai. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|March 14|en|March 14|qid=Q2404|lt=March 14|1=March 14}}) – The office of the {{ill|Karafuto Kaitakushi|ja|樺太開拓使|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karafuto Kaitakushi|1=Karafuto Development Commission|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11543658}} was established. == Births == * {{ill|Daiei (era)|en|Daiei (era)|qid=Q1193564|lt=Daiei|1=Daiei (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1522|en|1522|qid=Q6299|lt=1522|1=1522}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – {{ill|Miyoshi Nagayoshi|en|Miyoshi Nagayoshi|qid=Q1064909|lt=Miyoshi Chōkei|1=Miyoshi Nagayoshi}}, a Sengoku Daimyō (died {{ill|1564|en|1564|qid=Q6632|lt=1564|1=1564}}). * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1555|en|1555|qid=Q6579|lt=1555|1=1555}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – {{ill|Achachoku|ja|阿茶局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achachoku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 雲光院|1=Lady Acha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10564976}}, a consort of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (died {{ill|1637|en|1637|qid=Q6889|lt=1637|1=1637}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – {{ill|Shibusawa Eiichi|en|Shibusawa Eiichi|qid=Q704995|lt=Shibusawa Eiichi|1=Shibusawa Eiichi}}, a businessman (died {{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931|1=1931}}). * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – {{ill|Uchimura Kanzō|en|Uchimura Kanzō|qid=Q485247|lt=Uchimura Kanzō|1=Uchimura Kanzō}}, a thinker and founder of non-denominational Christianity (died {{ill|1930|en|1930|qid=Q18787|lt=1930|1=1930}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1603|en|1603|qid=Q6735|lt=1603|1=1603}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – {{ill|Ikoma Chikamasa|en|Ikoma Chikamasa|qid=Q1059845|lt=Ikoma Chikasa|1=Ikoma Chikamasa}}, a Daimyō (born {{ill|1526|en|1526|qid=Q6325|lt=1526|1=1526}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|12|2|14|1|13|3|2|0213|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|2月13日 (旧暦)|version=104365003|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:2 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:February 13 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 2월 13일]] [[ja:2月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月十三]]
[[ar:February 13 (Lunisolar)]]
